purpose: Preserve the existing price-explanation infographic while adding the owner's required literal thank-you message.

generation.input_role: sole edit target and visual source of truth
generation.prompt:
Use case: text-localization
Asset type: Amazon product gallery infographic, version 2
Input image: Image 1 is the edit target and sole source of truth.
Primary request: Edit ONLY the dark-green footer band at the very bottom. Preserve every pixel, logo, photograph, illustration, heading, body copy, color, spacing, and layout above that footer unchanged.
Footer layout: render exactly two centered white lines, balanced and fully legible:
Line 1, larger clean bold sans-serif: "Thank you for your purchase."
Line 2, smaller elegant script or refined serif: "Warmly, the Salutem Solutions Team."
Text must be verbatim with exact spelling, punctuation, capitalization, and no extra characters.
Canvas: preserve the original square 2000x2000 composition and white/green palette.
Constraints: no changes outside the footer; do not alter or invent the Salutem Solutions logo; no watermark; no extra text; no cropping; no new objects.

review_candidate.resampling: ffmpeg lanczos upscale from the generated candidate; no semantic edit

verification.verification_note: The generative edit is highly similar but not byte-identical above the footer; owner visual approval remains mandatory.

rollback.strategy: Keep the current v1 source and Amazon rehost immutable; publish v2 under a new key and restore the prior locator if rollback is required.
